sources.title: Identity Verification Market Size, Share & Trends Report 2030
sources.claim: Global identity verification market valued at USD 9.87B in 2022, projected to reach USD 33.93B by 2030 at 16.7% CAGR

sources.title: Identity Verification Market Size, Share & Growth Forecast to 2034
sources.claim: Identity verification market projected from USD 11.18B in 2026 to USD 51.42B by 2034

sources.title: How AI and deepfakes are reshaping identity fraud in 2026
sources.claim: Deepfakes account for 11% of all global fraud activity in 2026, up from 7% in 2024; deepfakes represent 40% of biometric fraud attempts

sources.title: Deepfake Statistics 2026: Verified Benchmarks & Risks
sources.claim: Human detection accuracy of high-quality deepfakes: 24.5%; deepfake fraud attempts increased 2,137% over 3 years; global scam losses via AI-enabled fraud hit $1T in 2024

sources.title: 150+ Deepfake Statistics (March 2026)
sources.claim: Deepfake fraud losses reached $1.56B cumulative by end of 2025; $200M+ lost in Q1 2025 alone; 669% YoY escalation from 2024 to 2025

sources.title: Pindrop secures $100M financing to accelerate fraud and voice AI
sources.claim: Pindrop secured $100M debt financing from Hercules Capital; analyzes 1,400+ voice attributes per call; deployed at major US banks handling 350M+ calls/year

sources.title: Reality Defender raises $15M to detect text, video and image deepfakes
sources.claim: Reality Defender raised $15M Series A led by DCVC with participation from Comcast and Ex/ante for multimodal deepfake detection

sources.title: Socure raises $450M at $4.5B valuation, adding Tiger Global as new investor
sources.claim: Socure raised $450M at $4.5B valuation; 1,900+ enterprise clients including top 25 US banks and 4 of 5 top US credit card issuers

sources.title: Jumio adds iProov award-winning liveness detection to its KYX platform
sources.claim: iProov's Flashmark technology deployed at UK HMRC, European Commission, Singapore IDA, US DHS; Jumio partnership to integrate government-grade liveness detection

sources.title: AI Deepfake Detection Market Outlook 2026-2034
sources.claim: AI deepfake detection market valued at USD 635.7M in 2025, projected to reach USD 1.84B by 2034

sources.title: Deepfake Statistics 2026: AI Fraud Data and Trends
sources.claim: Average enterprise loss per deepfake incident: $280K-$500K; average $500K loss per incident in 2024 for large businesses

sources.title: Identity Verification Market Report 2025-2030
sources.claim: US identity verification market projected from $10.9B in 2023 to $21.8B by 2028 at 14.9% CAGR

unverified_claims.claim: 71% of consumers report fear of being deceived by deepfakes
unverified_claims.note: Cited by Keepnet but original survey source not independently confirmed

unverified_claims.claim: Jumio has completed 1B+ identity verifications globally
iProov has had zero successful spoof attacks against Flashmark as of 2025
unverified_claims.note: Company claim; no independent third-party audit source identified
